title: stipa globosa
intro: Stipa globosa, also known as Globe Cotton-Grass, is a perennial grass species native to mountainous regions of Central Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects, making it useful in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Stipa globosa include reducing inflammation, relieving congestion, and soothing digestive issues. Traditionally, the plant is prepared for herbal use through infusions or decoctions of its leaves and stems, which are then consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
